text.title: E2E Testing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for scaffolding a Playwright E2E suite from a user-journey list.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Parse journeys. Load `templates/_smoke-test.yaml` (or the project's user-journeys.yaml). Validate every journey has steps + expected_outcome. Drop entries with placeholder TODOs.

Step 2 — Run the decision tree. Compute drivers: framework_preference, visual_regression_needed, ci_machine_budget, journey_count. Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Pick a leaf (greenfield → r-greenfield, etc.).

Step 3 — Scaffold POM + auth. Drop `templates/playwright.config.ts`, `templates/pom-base.ts`, `templates/auth-setup.ts` into the project at `tests/e2e/`. Author one concrete Page Object per major route. Wire setup project as dependency in config.
Step 4 — Author factories + tests. Use `templates/factory.ts` as the data-generation skeleton. Each test acquires its own user/product/order; never reads from another test's residue.

Step 5 — Wire CI. Drop `templates/ci-workflow.yml` into `.github/workflows/`. Set `matrix.shard` to the chosen `ci_shard_count`. Add TEST_USER_EMAIL / TEST_USER_PASSWORD as GitHub Secrets. Run; verify merged HTML report uploads.
